context_keywords.description: WS4: context keyword boosting for custom patterns (migration 000038)

classification_mode.description:
ClassificationMode controls which detection engines the scanner uses.
Options: "regex" (regex only), "ner" (regex+spaCy NER), "contextual" (regex+NER+contextual).
Default (empty) = "contextual" (all engines enabled).

custom_patterns.description: CustomPatterns are user-defined patterns appended to the scan; populated by backend at trigger time.

pii_types_per_source.description:
PIITypesPerSource maps profile_name → PII types for that source.
When set, overrides the global PIITypes for the specified sources.
Sources not listed here fall back to the global PIITypes.

consent_mechanism.description: ConsentMechanism must be one of: explicit, implicit, legitimate_interest
